title: I Release the Need to Chase and Allow Effortless Flow
subtitle: An energy statement for releasing the habit of pushing and welcoming money that arrives without effort
excerpt: A short energy statement for when the compulsion to chase money, clients, or income is strong. The release names the habit of force; the allow points toward the system already in place that keeps income arriving without the need to push.
sourceNotes: Adapted from the Day 69 theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program to Attract Cash, Overflow & Abundance Without Hustle or Burnout (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798268793796). The release-and-allow framework is from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).

practice.whenToUse: Use when you notice the urge to force or push to make money happen — when rest feels irresponsible, when you find yourself chasing rather than trusting the systems you have built.

content.text: A short energy statement for the compulsion to push money to happen — the background belief that if you stop chasing, the income stops too. The release names that habitual force; the allow names the steady, built system that keeps running without it.
I am ready to release the belief that money requires constant chasing and effort to arrive. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align with and allow money to flow steadily and easily through the system I have already built, without force. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
Adapted from the Day 69 theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The release-and-allow structure is from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).
